title: An AI agent call that should cost $0.01 was costing $0.15
hook: Default Claude Agent SDK loaded 160 tool definitions. Token bill for a 12-turn task was 12× a bloated prompt. Two config classes of fix took it to under $0.01.

title: What I have learned about promotions
hook: After two decades coaching promo packets: make work matter, step outside your role, own everything, act the part.

title: Let's talk busy work
hook: Engineers don't need more velocity. They need clarity. Don't be a feature factory.

title: We don't debate AI tools. We work on the system around them.
hook: Linear's two PMs, Resend's 22 people. The gap between elite teams and everyone else isn't tooling. It's organizational structure.

title: From if-else to SOUL.md
hook: Two years ago you needed DAGs to build a support bot. Today you need a folder of markdown files. How we got here.

title: Agent harness 101: 9 components
hook: Sandbox, context engineering, orchestration, cost controls, tool access, memory, guardrails, observability, evals. Tools and trade-offs for each.

title: MCP Apps: Drive & Discover Mapbox demo
hook: An interactive Mapbox map running inside a Claude conversation. Cars drive, listings light up by fit. Built on the new MCP Apps spec.

title: Same agent, two months apart, completely different results
hook: Same model, same task. What changed: what the agent knows before it starts. Context engineering for AI SDLC.

title: Two AI agents argued and solved a customer bug
hook: Triage agent vs platform agent. 10 minutes vs the usual two-day three-person fire drill. Build specialists. Let them disagree.

title: Met in Delhi to push Atlan's context layer for AI
hook: AI agents live or die by the context they get. Models are commoditized. Doing context engineering well at enterprise scale is what Atlan is building.
